reasoning:
The baseline for this forecast is the stock price on Nov 7, 2025 (the most recent market close before the Nov 9 cutoff). Bunge (BG) recently reported Q3 2025 earnings on Nov 5, 2025, delivering a massive 59% EPS beat ($2.29 vs. $1.44 expected) and strong revenue that exceeded projections. This led to analyst price target upgrades (e.g., Barclays raising its PT to $105) and positive post-earnings momentum. 

In the short term (1 week), post-earnings-announcement drift (PEAD) and momentum strongly favor continued upside, so the probability for Nov 16 is set relatively high (57%). Over the medium term (1 month, Dec 9), the positive momentum should persist but with some reversion and fading edge (54%). By the 3-month horizon (Feb 7, 2026), the forecast coincides with Bunge's historical Q4 earnings timeline (typically early February). Due to the inherent unpredictability of the upcoming earnings report and general increasing market variance over longer horizons, uncertainty dominates here, bringing the probability closer to a coin flip (52%). This strictly obeys the instruction that uncertainty should increase with forecast horizon, naturally guiding longer-term estimates closer to 0.5.
